creator: cwmyung@snu.ac.kr
text:
To reproduce the bug, please follow the command (bhyve version 13.0):

```

$ bhyvectl --vm=reproVM --destroy

$ bhyve -s 2:0,ahci-hd,hyfuzz.img -s 3,hda -s 0:0,hostbridge -s 1:0,lpc -c 1 -m 512M -l bootrom,./BHYVE_UEFI.fd -HPA reproVM

```

File: [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pej9yQ9dg35xfG9bxzYyghEzjyGPQJ_M/view?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pej9yQ9dg35xfG9bxzYyghEzjyGPQJ_M/view?usp=sharing)

# Crash Logs

```

    at /usr/src/usr.sbin/bhyve/pci_hda.c:1059

    size=0, val=0x7fffdcbe3ca8, arg1=0x800e3cf00, arg2=0) at /usr/src/usr.sbin/bhyve/pci_emul.c:420

    at /usr/src/usr.sbin/bhyve/mem.c:162
```
